svg.title: QML binding graph for BurstRF spectrogram
svg.desc: Property dependency diagram showing how contentY, chunkIndex, slot, slotY, inBounds, and source are connected across ApplicationWindow, Flickable, Repeater delegate, and ScrollBar objects.
svg.text: readonly — no outbound bindings shown (referenced by Flickable & ScrollBar)
cascade depth: chunkIndex → slot → slotY → inBounds / source (4 levels per scroll step crossing a chunk boundary)
imperative write (destroys binding if target has one) / watch for loops
